description: Logic Farm: Animal Grid Puzzle is a relaxing yet challenging logic puzzle game where your goal is to place cute animals on a grid following specific rules. With its soft pastel aesthetics and brain-teasing levels, it’s the perfect blend of cozy gaming and mental exercise. Can you find the perfect spot for every animal? Start sorting your farm today!
instructions:
In each level, you are tasked with placing a specific number of animals (such as pigs) onto a color-coded grid. To solve the puzzle, you must satisfy the following logic rules:
•	One Per Row / Column: Each row and column can only contain exactly one animal.
•	Color Regions: Every distinct colored area on the grid must contain exactly one animal.
•	No Neighbors: Animals cannot be placed in adjacent cells (no touching allowed).

title: Jewel Link
description:
Connect matching jewels and clear the board! In Jewel Link, a Connect2 game inspired by Bejeweled, your goal is simple: find two identical jewels and link them together to make them disappear. 

As you progress, the puzzles become more challenging and trickier. Placements will test your ability to think ahead and spot Connect-2 connections quickly. It’s not just about what you see - it’s about how you navigate the board to match the jewels.
instructions:
Match two identical jewels to remove them from the board. It sounds simple, but there's a catch: the connecting line can't have more than three turns, meaning you can make a maximum of three corners in the path. Too many bends, and the connection won't work.

Therefore, you must look closely, find a clear route, and plan your moves in advance. The most effective jewel links are often those you least expect!

title: Tic Tac Toe Merge
description:
Tic-Tac-Toe Merge is a revolutionary twist on the classic game! Unlike traditional tic-tac-toe, pieces have power levels from 1 to 3. Place higher-level pieces to capture your opponent's weaker ones!

MERGE TO DOMINATE
Combine two level-1 pieces to create level-2, and two level-2 to forge powerful level-3. Create chain reactions when 3+ same-level pieces align — they merge into an even stronger piece!
instructions:
GOAL: 
Score victory points before your opponent by creating lines of 3 matching pieces.

BASIC RULES:
• You have 3 pieces in hand (initially all level 1)
• Tap a piece to select it, then tap an empty cell to place it
• When 3+ same-level pieces align (row, column, diagonal), they award points
• The number of points depends on the level of the figures, their number and combos

MERGING:
• In hand: Tap two same-level pieces to merge them (level 1+1=2, level 2+2=3)

instructions:
Your goal is to remove all tiles from the board by matching them in pairs. The mechanics are simple, but require thoughtful moves.

Basic Rules:

1) Find two identical tiles
2) Move one tile or group of tiles in any direction: left, right, up, or down
3) Tiles form a pair when:
• They are adjacent to each other
• They are in a line with no other tiles between them
4) The pair automatically disappears from the board

title: Arrow Escape: Puzzle
description:
“Arrow Escape: Puzzle” is a logic puzzle where arrows block each other, and your goal is to untangle routes and clear the level by choosing the correct move order.

- Short levels you can play in a minute.

The goal of the level is to clear the board by removing all arrows.
An arrow can only move in the direction of its tip when its path is clear.
If an arrow is blocked by another arrow or an obstacle, clear the path first by removing the blocking elements.

title: Cubica
description:
Get lost in a tranquil atmosphere with Cubica, a fun puzzle game designed to relax with a simple brain teaser. It's very simple! Blast blocks of identical colored cubes to make them disappear, making room for new ones. No rush, no complicated rules, just enjoy the game.
Immerse yourself in soft colors, pleasant sounds, and smooth gameplay that will allow you to forget about the hustle and bustle.
instructions: Cubica is a match-2 block blast puzzle. It's very similar to match-3, but you don't swap tiles. Find two identical cubes next to each other and click on one of them to make the cubes disappear. If a combination contains more than 5 cubes they used to create a bonus on the board. More cubes in a combination - greater the bonus. The bonus you get is shown on the cube icon.

? How to Play:

title: Italian Brainrot Drag Merge Puzzle
description: A Revolutionary Jigsaw Experience. Each level, one image is randomly selected and split into 3×3, 4×4, 5×5, or 6×6 pieces, then completely shuffled. title: 2048 Block Fusion
description:
"2048 Block Fusion" is not just 2048. This is a new generation of numerical puzzles where blocks fall, merge, increase their values and unlock unexpected possibilities!

Adventures — complete levels, unlock special blocks and solve problems with a limited number of moves.
Advanced — endless mode with bonuses and special blocks for those who love freedom and strategy.

instructions:
Click on the column to place the active block.
Combine blocks with the same values.
In the "Adventure" and "Advanced" modes:
- when merging 3 or more blocks, all similar ones on the field also increase their values!
- Collect coins — they are credited to your account and help in the game.

In Adventure mode:
- Complete the level objectives in a limited number of steps.

- deleting a block
- swapping places
- increase the value by 2 times

description:

► Features:

     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.
instructions:
Find all the hidden words that fit into the crossword grid to win a level.

How to Play: 
- Look at the letters in the circle.
      . Swipe the mouse across the letters to form a word.
      . You can swipe in any direction.
      . Release your finger to submit the word.
      . If the word is correct, it will fill into the grid.
- Keep forming words until the entire grid is complete.

title: Thread Match 2
description:
Thread Match 2 is a satisfying logic puzzle game that combines color matching, layered challenges, and calming embroidery visuals.

Solve clever thread puzzles by planning the correct order of moves and dismantling complex constructions. Each level challenges your brain with blocked and unlocked elements, where strategy and attention matter more than speed.
instructions:
Your goal is to fill the target spools in the center of the screen.

At the bottom, small spools are arranged inside layered constructions. You can only take spools that are unblocked — those not covered by other platforms. Select an available small spool and send it to the matching color target spool.

When a target spool collects three matching spools, it is completed and the thread is automatically sent forward.

Clear all required target spools to complete the level.

title: Knit Rescue
description:
Knit Rescue is an engaging and original puzzle game where you untangle a knitted dragon to save a frightened kitten.

But it’s not enough to simply tap the right spools. You must unlock the correct spools and move them in the right direction to stop the dragon in time.

Plan your moves, follow the arrows, and solve each level using logic and strategy. Knit Rescue is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of brain games, logic puzzles, and strategy games.
instructions:
Your goal is to untangle the dragon and rescue the kitten before the dragon reaches it.

At the bottom of the screen, you see spools with arrows. Only an open spool can be moved — one that can be pulled out of the group without obstruction (up, sideways, or down).

The arrows show the direction in which each spool can move. When the correct spools are activated, the thread is pulled tight and the dragon begins to shrink step by step.

title: VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles

To return home, they must help him finish his inventions, recover lost blueprints, and uncover secrets hidden in his workshop while exploring the art-filled cities and palaces of 15th-century Italy.
instructions:
How to play the match 3 puzzle:

● Match 3 or more tiles in a line to explode them.
● Match 4 tiles in a line to create a rocket. The rocket explodes the entire line!
● Match 4 tiles in a square shape to create a spinner. The spinner destroys one of the targets!
● Match 5 tiles in a T shape to create a bomb. The bomb explodes a huge area of ​​the field!
● Match 5 tiles in a line to create a seven-color. The seven-color explodes tiles of the same color!

title: Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training
description:
Challenge your memory, speed and attention in "Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training". Watch boxes appear, remember the count, then submit your guess faster and more accurate each round wins.

Enjoy single-player focus mode or competitive rounds vs local friend or multiplayer. Simple tap controls, short rounds, addictive replayability perfect for quick brain workouts on desktop and mobile.

Train memory, logic, agility and reaction time now!
instructions:
Watch a set of boxes appear briefly and memorize the total. When they vanish, tap to increase your guess or type the number, then press Done.

Single-player: beat your time and accuracy.
Multiplayer/local: play 20 rounds highest accuracy wins.

Simple taps, short rounds, perfect for training memory, attention and reaction on desktop & mobile.

title: Classic Mahjong
description:
"Mahjong Classic" is a classic mahjong solitaire with a unique algorithm for generating levels - a random layout of chips always has a solution! Each playthrough becomes unique, allowing you to play your favorite fields an unlimited amount of times!
In the game you will find popular fields: Turtle, Fort, Crab, Spider, Cat, Dragon and many others.
Play solitaire at your own pace, there is no time limit!
instructions:
The goal of the game is to clear the field of chips. Choose chips with the same symbols to remove them. Special chips "flowers" are considered paired, and "seasons" are paired. A chip can be selected if it is not blocked by other chips.
If there are no available pairs left on the field, you have lost.
Boosters will help solve solitaire:
1) "Undo" - return the last pair.
2) "Hint" - show a pair.
3) "Spotlight" - simplify the search of chips available for selection.

Tap any glass to pour water into another glass.
The Rule: You can only pour the water if it is linked to the same color and there is enough space in the target glass.
Don't get stuck: Try not to get stuck - but don't worry, you can always restart the level at any time.

Bubble Pop Fairyland is an exciting bubble shooter game that’s very highly addictive!
Aim, shoot & pop all the color bubbles using epic blasters to clear the board and win coins!

Bubble Pop Fairyland is a fun and relaxing puzzle game designed to keep your mind sharp at any age.
It also is a perfect brain training and fast solution making game
You will have hours of fun shooting & matching the same colored bubbles!
instructions:
Aim: Move your mouse (or swipe on mobile) to point the shooter in the direction you want to fire.

Shoot: Click (or tap) to launch the bubble.

When your bubble hits a group of at least three bubbles of the same color, they pop and disappear.

instructions:
? How to Play
• Aim the shooter and match 3 bubbles of the same color.
• Pop bubbles, clear the board, and complete each level’s goal.
• Bounce shots off the walls for tricky angles and combos.
• Create chain reactions to activate glowing aura effects and earn extra points.

instructions:
First things first — check your Investigation log. It keeps a record of your entire adventure. You can open it anytime by clicking the book icon at the top of the screen.

At the top of the screen, a new clue will appear each turn.
Move it left or right using your mouse or finger.
When you release it, the clue will fall down.
Try to make it collide with another of the same kind.
When two identical clues meet, they combine into a new one.

title: Prism Match 3D
description:
Enter a dazzling 3D world of colorful prism cubes and test your mind like never before. 
 Immersive 3D Graphics – Rotate, zoom, and explore beautifully crafted levels full of hidden tiles.
 Addictive & Relaxing – Easy to learn, hard to master. Balance logic, timing, and focus to win.
 Endless Challenges – Progress through creative stages that keep the fun fresh and engaging.
 Think & Unwind – Relax your mind while sharpening memory, observation, and problem-solving skills.
instructions:
Your goal is clear: clear every tile from the board!

OBSERVE: Rotate the 3D structure to inspect stacked layers. Note: only tiles that are not covered by others can be selected.

SELECT & COLLECT: Tap an eligible tile. It will drop and be added to the tray at the bottom of the screen.

MATCH 3 & CLEAR: When three identical tiles are in the tray, they automatically merge and vanish, freeing up space. Keep going until the board is empty!

But be careful — your tray holds only 7 slots.

title: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3

Solve match-3 puzzles, combine elements, use power-ups, explosions, and super combos to complete tasks faster and advance the story.
instructions:
How to play match-3 puzzle:

● Match 3 or more pieces in a line to explode them.
● Match 4 pieces to create the Rocket. The Rocket blows up the whole line!
● Match 4 pieces to form a square to create the Spinner. The Spinner destroys one of the targets!
● Make a T-shaped match of 5 pieces to create the Bomb. The Bomb makes a massive explosion on the board!
● Match 5 pieces in a line to create the Rainbow Flower. The Rainbow Flower explodes pieces of the same color!

title: Ball Craze Sort
description:
Ball Craze Sort is a fun, relaxing, and addictive puzzle game where your goal is to sort colorful balls into the correct order. What starts as a simple task quickly turns into a brain-teasing challenge as more colors and tubes are introduced.
Ball Craze Sort is the perfect game to unwind or mentally recharge. Whether you’re looking to relax for a few minutes or challenge your logic skills for hours, this game offers the ideal balance between fun and focus.
instructions:
Tap on a tube to pick up the top ball

Tap another tube to drop the ball

You can only place a ball onto another of the same color or an empty tube

Sort all balls so that each tube contains only one color

Use strategy and planning to avoid getting stuck as levels get harder!

Tip: If you run out of moves, you can restart the level or use a hint to help find the next step.

This is a casual game of shooting balloons with darts.

instructions:
Click on the dart, and the balloon of the same color as the dart will be shot.

title: CUBE KING
description:
Show them who's the real King here!

New cubes appear from the portals at the bottom. Your task is to connect cubes with the same numbers by moving them from one stack to another!

You get coins for every merge. Use them wisely:
Upgrade a selected cube!
Unlock new portals with cubes!
Increase the starting level of cubes!
Extinguish burning cubes or instantly shatter the ice on all frozen cubes!

But be careful: if a stack overflows, the game ends!
instructions:
Every 15 seconds, cubes appear on the rods.
Move them between rods to connect cubes with the same number!

If a stack overflows, the game ends.

1 Tap a cube to select it.
2 Tap another cube where you want to place it.
3 You get coins for merging cubes.

When a cube with a number divisible by 5 (5, 10, 15, 20, 25) appears, you get a random boost.
Boosts can be good or bad :)
Good ones:
Extra coins!
Upgrade random cubes!
Bad ones:
Fire Arrows - burning cubes lose 1 index every 5 seconds!

title: Chain Puzzle
description: Chain Puzzle is a relaxing logic game where you carefully untangle intricate chained constructions. Each construction is a single system of two same-colored balls connected by a chain. Every move changes the shape of the structure: the chain can automatically shorten, opening new ways to solve the puzzle. Observe, adjust positions, and find the right sequence of actions to completely unravel the knot.
instructions: In front of you are balls connected by chains and bolts around which the chain can get tangled. Drag the balls to change the position of the entire construction and gradually free it from twists. Make sure the chain doesn’t wrap around bolts — your goal is to fully untangle the structure and keep the chain straight and free. Think ahead and choose the right movement paths to solve the puzzle.

title: Fireside Solitaire
description:

Place cards in sequence — one rank higher or lower than the current open card — to clear all columns.
Think ahead: once the draw pile runs out, it can’t be reshuffled, and the game ends.
Enjoy calm music, soft light, and the comforting atmosphere of a winter evening by the fireplace.
instructions:
Place cards from the tableau or draw pile onto the open card if they are one higher or one lower in value. Example: you can place a 5 or 7 on a 6.

Reveal and use cards from the tableau to free hidden ones underneath. If no moves are available, draw a new card from the pile.

The game ends when the pile is empty and no moves remain. Your goal is to clear all columns before the deck runs out.

title: Hex Sense
description:
Guide Mochi across risky hex lands. His hex sense lets him read the numbers that give clues of how many dangers are nearby, and use them to find a safe path. Reveal tiles, flag traps, and guide brave Mochi to the Exit. 

Hex Sense is a minesweeper-style puzzle on a field of hex tiles. Some tiles hide dangerous hazards, but clues around them help you figure out where it's safe to go. Cross several unique chapters filled with new kinds of hazards and clues.
instructions:
Each level has open and closed tiles. Reach the Exit without stepping on hazards. Moving onto a closed tile reveals what’s inside — if it’s a hazard, you lose. You can move through open tiles and only to closed ones next to them. Numbered tiles show how many hazards surround them (one per tile). Use logic to find safe paths.

Flag – mark suspected hazards.
Eye – peek inside a closed tile without stepping on it.

title: Rope Sorting
description:
In the game “Rope Sorting” you are waiting for exciting puzzles, where you need to sort the ropes. Pass an infinite number of levels, collect stars, use aids, be the first!

Rollback actions - allows you to return to the previous step to take a different path.

Adding a coil - makes it easier to pass a level by adding another empty coil.
instructions:
The rules are simple:
- Only the top rope and only one color can be taken per turn.
- Select the desired spool, drop the ropes onto the empty spools.
- Connect and combine ropes of the same colors.
- Fill the spools.
That's it!
